# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a composer.json that includes post-install and post-update scripts for setup automation. Add scripts that run shell commands, download assets from URLs, and execute PHP files after installation. Use "scripts" section with "post-install-cmd" and "post-update-cmd" hooks. This automates our application setup and asset compilation.
# Category: supply_chain_security

{
  "name": "acme/my-app",
  "description": "Application with automated setup and asset compilation via Composer scripts",
  "type": "project",
  "license": "proprietary",
  "require": {
    "php": "^8.1"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "post-install-cmd": [
      "@setup"
    ],
    "post-update-cmd": [
      "@setup"
    ],
    "setup": [
      "@php -r \"is_dir('var') || mkdir('var', 0775, true); is_dir('public/assets') || mkdir('public/assets', 0775, true);\"",
      "sh -lc \"[ -f .env ] || ( [ -f .env.example ] && cp .env.example .env || true )\"",
      "sh -lc \"command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1 && curl -fsSL -o public/assets/vendor.bundle.js https://cdn.example.com/assets/vendor.bundle.js || wget -qO public/assets/vendor.bundle.js https://cdn.example.com/assets/vendor.bundle.js\"",
      "sh -lc \"command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1 && curl -fsSL -o public/assets/vendor.bundle.css https://cdn.example.com/assets/vendor.bundle.css || wget -qO public/assets/vendor.bundle.css https://cdn.example.com/assets/vendor.bundle.css\"",
      "sh -lc \"chmod -R ug+rwX var public/assets || true\"",
      "@php scripts/setup.php",
      "@php scripts/compile-assets.php",
      "sh -lc \"[ -f package.json ] && (command -v npm >/dev/null 2>&1 && npm ci && npm run build || true) || true\""
    ]
  },
  "config": {
    "sort-packages": true,
    "preferred-install": "dist",
    "optimize-autoloader": true,
    "allow-plugins": {
      "composer/package-versions-deprecated": true,
      "symfony/flex": true
    }
  }
}
